behaviors.behavior: valid JSON -> no-op (no backup, no write)
behaviors.evidence: repair-claude-json.test.mjs 'repairJsonText: valid' + 'repairFile: valid file -> noop' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: truncation-tail -> repaired, only tail discarded, prefix byte-preserved
behaviors.evidence: 'repairJsonText: truncation-tail' + 'repairFile: truncation-tail file -> repaired, round-trips' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: string/escape-aware brace scan (brace or escaped quote inside string does not close object)
behaviors.evidence: 'findFirstBalancedObject: braces inside a string value are ignored' + 'escaped quote ... does not end the string' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: implausible structure (parses, <3 keys / no projects) -> no overwrite
behaviors.evidence: 'repairJsonText: implausible structure' + 'repairFile: implausible balanced object -> not overwritten' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: garbage / no balanced object / unterminated string -> no overwrite
behaviors.evidence: 'repairJsonText: garbage', 'unbalanced (never closes)', 'unterminated string at EOF' + 'repairFile: unrepairable garbage -> file unchanged' PASSED
'repairJsonText: empty / whitespace-only' + 'repairFile: empty file -> noop' PASSED
'repairFile: absent file -> noop, nothing created' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: backup created + corrupt original preserved as .corrupt-<ts>.bak; atomic write leaves a re-parseable file; no temp litter
behaviors.evidence: 'repairFile: truncation-tail file -> repaired ... backup keeps original' (asserts 1 backup w/ original bytes, file re-parses, no .tmp- left) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: prune keeps newest ~10 backups and never deletes the just-made backup
behaviors.evidence: 'pruneBackups: keeps the newest 10' + 'never deletes the excepted (just-made) backup' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: two complete plausible configs -> refuse (multiple_candidates), file untouched (data-loss guard)
behaviors.evidence: 'repairJsonText: TWO complete plausible configs -> unrepairable (multiple_candidates)' PASSED + CLI smoke C2 (exit 1, file untouched, no new backup)
'main: exit-code contract (0 ..., 1 unrepairable)' PASSED + CLI smoke 4 cases against temp HOME

behaviors.behavior: backupTimestamp fixed-width / filename-safe (load-bearing for prune sort)
PowerShell deploy hook runs repair at step 0 before the build and NEVER gates the deploy on its exit code (best effort)
behaviors.reason: the production deploy script is an interactive, destructive operator script (force-kills the live :3847 server, rebuilds server+client, uses Read-Host); its runtime control flow is not CI-drivable. The non-gating property is guaranteed by construction (no `if ($LASTEXITCODE)` check, explicit `$global:LASTEXITCODE = 0` reset, try/catch around the call) and the file parses clean (PowerShell AST ParseFile check).

surface_verification.justification: Ops deploy-time CLI helper (scripts/repair-claude-json.mjs); no webui runtime/web/API/store/WS surface in the diff. Verified end-to-end via the node:test round-trip suite (24 tests, exit 0) plus a 4-case CLI smoke (truncation-tail->repaired, valid->noop, unrepairable->exit1, absent->noop) run against a temp HOME.
